title: Rakan (starship)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Rakan''''' was a pair of [[Modular conveyor]]s belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in the Airam sector during the operations of [[Task Force Vengeance]].

''Rakan'' were part of a fifteen ship convoy charged with delivering the needed supplies and personnel for the construction of a shipyard in the Airam sector. ''Rakan 1'' bore a fabricator while ''Rakan 2'' bored a large reactor. Unfortunately, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] had learned of the convoy and readied a [[Battle of Rocrin|trap]] in the [[Rocrin system/Legends|Rocrin system]]. Trapped by the Imperials' [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|interdictor cruiser]] ''Compellor'', the Modular Conveyors ''Rakan'' were destroyed along with the rest of the convoy.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]''
